task: Generate a JSON configuration for an AWS Lambda function that processes S3 events.
solution_criteria: The JSON should include FunctionName, Runtime (python3.11), Handler, Role ARN, Timeout (60 seconds), Memory (256 MB), and an environment variable for the S3 bucket name.

task: Generate a JSON configuration for an AWS Lambda function triggered by API Gateway.
solution_criteria: The JSON should include FunctionName, Runtime (nodejs18.x), Handler, Role ARN, Timeout (30 seconds), Memory (128 MB), and CORS configuration in environment variables.

task: Generate a JSON configuration for an AWS Lambda function that logs to CloudWatch.
solution_criteria: The JSON should include FunctionName, Runtime (python3.11), Handler, Role ARN with CloudWatch Logs permissions, Timeout (120 seconds), Memory (512 MB), and LoggingConfig with log group specification.
